messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May quality release the clinical batch?

context.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
context.anomaly_observed: A deviation alert remains visible; closure must prove abstract assay-acceptance status.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Batch release BATCH-FJO-086 releases clinical batch FJ-86 for shipment on 2026-06-28.
Deviation alert DEV-FJO-086 remains visible for assay AX-41 and warns that assay acceptance must be verified before shipment.
Deviation closure CLOSE-FJO-086 covers batch FJ-86, assay AX-41, criterion Cq<=31, release date 2026-06-28, and accepted retest result before shipment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Clinical batch release is complete only when deviation closure matches batch, assay, criterion, release date, and assay-acceptance status before shipment.
